sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Gray area:")
for r in range(41, 47):
    print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][23:44]}")

# Check all gray markers
gray = [n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
print("\nGray markers:", [(n['id'], n['boundary']) for n in gray])

# Also check blue bar
blue = [n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10]
print("Blue bar pixels:", [n['pixels'] for n in blue])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
